content: ICM’s intrinsic reward for novel state discovery can be repurposed to actively work around LLM agent working memory capacity limits, by encouraging the agent to chunk sequential reasoning steps into smaller novel subgoals that each fit within the current working memory window. This creates a self-regulating intrinsic reward cycle that prevents reasoning degradation from overloading working memory.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
